settings.updates.title: Updates
updater.modal.pleaseWait: Please wait — this can take a minute
updater.modal.readyToInstall: The new version has been downloaded. Installing it will close and restart the app.
updater.modal.brewSucceeded: Homebrew finished. The app will restart automatically.
settings.title: Settings
settings.repoUrl.label: Repo URL
settings.target.label: Rules target folder
settings.target.placeholder: Path to your AI rules folder (e.g. ~/.claude)
settings.localRepo.label: Local repo path
settings.github.title: GitHub
settings.language.title: Language
push.error.notConfigured: Sync not configured. Open Settings to set Repo URL.
push.error.nothingEnabled: Nothing to sync — enable Claude or add a Cursor project in Settings.
install.modal.title: Install local changes
install.modal.description: Pulls content from the sync repo back to your system.
install.modal.claude.label: Claude (~/.claude)
install.modal.claude.hint: Runs install.ps1/install.sh from the repo (creates symlinks with backup).
install.modal.claude.disabled: Claude is not enabled in Settings.
install.modal.cursor.heading: Cursor projects
install.modal.cursor.overwriteHint: Cursor projects are overwritten. Uncommitted local changes in <project>/.cursor/ will appear in your project's git diff.
sync.noTargets.text: Repo is ready, but no sync targets are configured. Set up Claude or Cursor projects to start syncing.
sync.popover.discardConfirm: Discard all local changes? This cannot be undone.
settings.claude.description: Sync the global Claude config folder (rules, skills, commands, settings).
settings.claude.path.label: Claude folder
settings.claude.path.hint: Usually ~/.claude — the folder Claude Code reads its config from.
settings.cursor.description: Cursor stores rules and skills inside each project's .cursor/ folder. Register the project paths you want to sync.
settings.cursor.title: Cursor projects
settings.cursor.empty: No Cursor projects registered. Add one to start syncing its rules and skills.
settings.cursor.add.title: Add Cursor project
settings.cursor.add.name: Name (used as repo subfolder)
settings.cursor.add.linkHint: Found these in the sync repo. Click to use that name and just pick the local project path.
cursor.error.nameInvalid: Name contains invalid characters or whitespace
cursor.error.duplicateName: A project named "{{name}}" is already registered
push.error.invalidJson: Invalid JSON in claude/settings.json — fix it before push.
push.error.network: Network error talking to GitHub. Check VPN/proxy and click Push to retry.{{tail}}
push.error.auth: GitHub auth rejected. Sign out and sign in again, then retry.{{tail}}
push.error.conflict: Merge conflict during rebase. Resolve manually in {{repoPath}}, then click Push again.
push.error.pullOther: git pull --rebase failed{{tail}}. See log above.
push.info.nothingToPush: Nothing to push — local config matches repo.
init.error.cloneFailedKeepRepo: git clone failed after retries (exit {{code}}). Repo was created at {{repoUrl}} — delete it on GitHub and retry, or paste its URL in Settings to use it as-is.
init.error.pushFailedKeepRepo: git push failed after retries (exit {{code}}). Repo was created at {{repoUrl}} — delete it on GitHub and retry, or push manually.
init.title: Initialize new repo from current config
init.signIn.title: Sign in to GitHub
init.signIn.description: claudesync needs GitHub access to create repos and push commits on your behalf.
init.repoSettings.name: Repo name
init.repoSettings.error.nameExists: Repository {{owner}}/{{name}} already exists. Pick another name.
init.preview.envWarning: API keys in settings.json will be stripped — re-add them via Plugin manager after pushing.
init.preview.description: A new repo will be created with an empty skeleton — no Claude or Cursor data is uploaded at this step.
init.preview.afterHint: After creation, configure your targets in Settings (Claude / Cursor tabs) and click Push to upload your data.
init.preview.hint.claude: Claude config (CLAUDE.md, settings.json, commands, skills, project memory)
config.error.localRepoAbsolute: Local repo path must be absolute.
config.error.localRepoNotDir: Local repo path must be a directory.
config.error.localRepoNotEmpty: Folder is not empty and not a git repo — pick a fresh path or an existing clone.
config.error.urlInvalid: Invalid URL format (expected https:// or git@).
config.error.targetAbsolute: Rules target folder must be absolute.
plugins.noTarget: Plugin manager requires a configured Rules target.
plugins.restart: Plugins updated. Restart Claude Code to apply.
plugins.conflict.title: Marketplace conflict
pull.tooltip.notConfigured: Pull requires Repo URL and Rules target in Settings
push.tooltip.notConfigured: Push requires Repo URL and Rules target in Settings
push.modal.title: Push Local Changes
push.modal.commitMessage.label: Commit message
push.modal.includeSecrets.label: Include API keys in settings.json env
push.modal.includeSecrets.warning: ⚠ Only enable for PRIVATE repositories. Public repos will leak your keys to git history.
envPrompt.title: {{pluginName}} — API Key required
deviceFlow.title: Sign in to GitHub
deviceFlow.step3: After authorizing in browser, click below:
sync.noRepo.title: No repo configured.
sync.noRepo.initialize: Initialize new repo from current config
conflict.error.markersRemain: File still has merge markers (<<<<<<<). Remove them and try again.
conflict.modal.title: Resolve merge conflict
conflict.modal.description: Pick one side per file or open the file in your editor. Press Continue when all files are resolved.
conflict.modal.abortConfirm: Discard local commits and abort rebase?
conflict.fileList.title: Files in conflict
conflict.diff.tooLarge: File too large to preview ({{size}} KB) — open in editor
